note: Per-million-token USD prices for Legion cost accounting + cost-aware routing. Matched by case-insensitive substring against the model id; FIRST match in `models` wins (order specific -> general). Claude prices are current API list (Opus 4.8 $5/$25, Sonnet 4.6 $3/$15, Haiku 4.5 $1/$5; cache_read ~= 0.1x input, cache_write ~= 1.25x input). GPT-5.x are OpenAI API REFERENCE prices used as a shadow cost so routing can compare Claude vs Codex on one dollar basis. NOTE: when Codex runs on a ChatGPT subscription the marginal per-token bill is flat-rate, not these numbers — these exist so the router can make cost-optimal executor choices; set them to 0 if you want subscription usage treated as free. OpenAI has no cache-write premium, so GPT cache_write is 0.
